item.title: Direction
item.description: Up to now, development in Mere has focused on laying out its foundation. Much of that was discovering what Mere is, what makes it different. At times that has led to indecision, and that slows progress. In the meantime, some of the ideas and chosen tools have sparked interest. But Mere’s usability has been low, as ideas and concepts took priority in development over usability. So now, to build some adoption, the project is re-focusing efforts to release a stable and usable first version.
